title: AnthropicAdapter convert_messages serializes ChatMessages via to_value introducing inefficiency
description:
## Severity
Trivial
## Dimension
complexity
## Location
src/providers/anthropic.rs:44-50
## Violation
convert_messages serializes typed ChatMessage into serde_json::Value via to_value before passing to convert_messages_to_anthropic which then re-parses Value back into individual fields via get(...).and_then(...). A typed-to-Value-to-typed dance with allocation on every request:

  let as_values: Vec<Value> = messages.iter().filter_map(|m| serde_json::to_value(m).ok()).collect();
  convert_messages_to_anthropic(&as_values)

The fix for crosslink #475 used to_value() as the easy unification, but it costs O(messages) allocations per request and silently drops messages that fail to_value (filter_map .ok()).
## Mandated refactor
Refactor convert_messages_to_anthropic to accept an iterator over a trait (MessageView) that both Value and ChatMessage implement. Or split into two impls. At minimum, replace filter_map(.ok()) with expect-or-log so serialization failures (which should be impossible for ChatMessage) are not silently dropped.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
